articles.title: Users cry foul after AMD stripped memory crypto from its consumer CPUs
articles.content: AMD's stripping of TSME from consumer CPUs appears to be a deliberate, covert move.
articles.titleZh: AMD从其消费者CPU中剥离内存加密后，用户哭泣犯规
articles.contentZh: AMD从消费者CPU中剥离TSME似乎是一个蓄意的、秘密的举动。

articles.title: PeopleSoft 0-day affecting hundreds of organizations steals gigabytes of data
articles.content: Vulnerability in the Oracle-owned PeopleSoft software is about as critical as they come.
articles.titleZh: PeopleSoft 0-day影响数百个组织窃取数千兆字节的数据
articles.contentZh: Oracle拥有的PeopleSoft软件中的漏洞与它们一样严重。

articles.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
articles.content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.
articles.titleZh: 微软与研究人员激烈竞争，修复了他们披露的0天
articles.contentZh: Nightmare Eclipse披露的另一个零日似乎也被修补了。

articles.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single faulty character
articles.content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.
articles.titleZh: Linux中由单个故障字符引起的高严重性漏洞
articles.contentZh: 自由使用后的漏洞可以被利用来逃避沙盒防御。

articles.title: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
articles.content: As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 […]
articles.contentZh: 随着美国其他地区庆祝美国首次赢得世界杯冠军和纽约尼克斯锦标赛， Anthropic在周末与特朗普政府就其最新车型发布进行了斗争。周五下午5:21 ，该公司收到美国出口管制指令，暂停访问其神话5和寓言5 […]

articles.title: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
articles.content: Your public Facebook posts could help inform AI-generated results in Meta's new AI Mode. When you search on Facebook, the "AI Mode" option will appear alongside the usual search modes like "People" and "Marketplace." It's one of several new AI features Meta is rolling out starting today, including photo presets that swap sports jerseys onto […]
articles.titleZh: Facebook的新AI模式搜索从公开帖子中获取信息
articles.contentZh: 您的公开Facebook帖子可以帮助在Meta的新AI模式中为AI生成的结果提供信息。当您在Facebook上搜索时， “AI模式”选项将与“人员”和“市场”等常见搜索模式一起显示。“这是Meta从今天开始推出的几项新AI功能之一，包括将运动衫换成[…]的照片预设。
